affiliations.display: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司

backstory.original: The sorcerer known as Strix hails from Sigil, the City of Doors at the center of the multiverse. Very little is known of Strix's heritage, even to herself, but it was recently discovered that she was a powerful member of the Skizziks family, who long ago made a pact with Asmodeus, ruler of the Nine Hells, to become Tieflings. Strix is careful, suspicious, and paranoid. She assumes the worst in everyone and is always ready to run away or hide. She lacks basic manners and maintains poor personal hygiene, exemplified by the collection of filthy oddities she hoards within her robes. As a child, Strix witnessed a shadowy creature slaughter her friends at the bakery where she worked, but was spared for unknown reasons. Her survivor's guilt drives her to try and help those in need, no matter the personal cost.
backstory.display: 术士斯崔克丝来自位于多元宇宙中心的众门之城印记城。包括斯崔克丝自己在内，没人清楚斯崔克丝的血缘，但最近有人发现她是斯奇克家族的一名强大成员。他们很久以前就与九层地狱的统治者阿斯摩蒂斯签订契约，成为了提夫林。斯崔克丝小心、多疑且偏执，她以最大的恶意去揣测所有人，并随时准备逃跑或藏起来。她缺乏基本的礼仪，个人卫生状况也很糟糕，例如她的长袍里总会囤积着一些肮脏的怪东西。小时候，斯崔克丝在她工作的面包店里目睹了她的朋友被一只暗影生物追杀，但由于不明原因而幸免。她对幸存者的愧疚感，驱使着她努力帮助那些需要帮助的人，而不计较个人的得失。

description.original: Strix throws a fireball at a random enemy, dealing a small amount of area damage.
description.display: 斯崔克丝向一名随机敌人投掷火球，造成少量范围伤害。

description.original: Strix's staff polymorphs into a random object, changing the way she attacks for a brief period.
description.display: 斯崔克丝的手杖变化成一件随机物体，在短时间内改变她的攻击方式。

longDescription.original: Strix's staff polymorphs into a pie plate, an owlbear plushy, or a flying broom, and changes her base attack for a brief period of time.
longDescription.display: 斯崔克丝的手杖变化成馅饼盘、毛绒枭熊或飞行扫帚，在短时间内改变她的基本攻击方式。

description.desc: Increases the damage of all Champions that are not adjacent to $source by $(amount)%. Increases damage dealt by $source by $amount% for each Champion affected, stacking additively
所有与$source不相邻的勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害。每有一位勇士被效果影响，$source造成的伤害提高 $amount%，以加算方式堆叠
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(not_buffed amount)% for every Champion death in the formation while Strix is in it, with stacks persisting until you reset
如果斯崔克丝在阵型中时有任何勇士死亡，则提升所有勇士 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害，此效果将持续堆叠，直到你重置冒险

tipText.original: Strix increases your party's damage for each ally who has been killed.
tipText.display: 每当一名盟友死亡，斯崔克丝均使队伍的伤害提高。

description.pre: If an ally within 2 spaces of Strix is about to be killed, Strix instead loses $lose_percent% of her max health and the ally regains $gain_percent% of their max health and is immune to all damage for 10 seconds. This effect can only trigger once every $wait_time seconds and adds 5 stacks to Haunted. While this ability is on cooldown, Aura of Unclean is increased by 400%.
如果距离斯崔克丝 2 格范围内的队友即将被击杀，斯崔克丝会以损失自身 $lose_percent% 最大生命值为代价，使该队友恢复其最大生命值的 $gain_percent%，并免疫所有伤害 10 秒。此效果在 $wait_time 秒内仅可触发一次，并增加 5 层“鬼影缠身”堆叠。此技能冷却期间，“不洁灵光”效果提高 400%。

description.desc: Enemies that approach the party within $(amount___2)% of the distance from the formation to where enemies appear take $(amount)% more damage due to Strix's unique odor
因为斯崔克丝的独特腐臭，靠近队伍的距离达到敌人出现点与阵型间距离 $(amount___2)% 以内的敌人额外受到 $(amount)%的伤害。

tipText.original: Strix causes enemies that approach your party to take additional damage.
tipText.display: 斯崔克丝使靠近队伍的敌人受到额外伤害。

name.original: The Power of Friendship (and Nose Plugs)

description.desc: The radius of Poor Hygiene is increased by $(amount___3)% (stacking additively and then applying multiplicatively) and the damage bonus is increased by $(amount)% (stacking multiplicatively) for each other Acquisitions Incorporated, "C" - Team, or Waffle Crew Champion in the formation.
阵型中的每位其他艾奎兹玄有限责任公司、“C”小队或华夫饼小队勇士均使“肮脏传染”的范围扩大 $(amount___3)%（以加算方式堆叠并以乘算方式生效），并且伤害加成提高 $(amount)%（以乘算方式堆叠）。
The base damage bonus effect of The Power of Friendship (and Nose Plugs) is increased by $(amount)%.
“友谊（和鼻塞）的力量”的基础伤害加成提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Strix's best friends don't seem bothered by her unique odor as much as most people are.
specializationDescription.display: 斯崔克丝最好的朋友们似乎并不像大多数人那样被她独特的气味所困扰。

description.desc: Buff Aura of Unclean by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Tiefling in the formation
阵型中每有一位提夫林勇士，“不净灵光”效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Strix doesn't spend much time around her own species, but when she does there is a distinctive scent.
specializationDescription.display: 斯崔克丝不会花太多时间和自己的族人待在一起，但当她这样做时，会发出一种独特的气味。

description.desc: The effect of Poor Hygiene is increased by $(amount)%.

specializationDescription.original: Strix can't quite remember what it was she ate, but it sure was tasty (and possibly expired).
specializationDescription.display: 斯崔克丝不太记得她吃的是什么，但肯定很好吃（可能过期了）。

description.original: I don't usually burn things I shouldn't. Usually...
description.display: 我通常不会烧那些不该烧的东西，通常......
哎呀！抱歉弄破了你的屋顶！

description.original: I don't want anyone to sacrifice themselves!
description.display: 我不希望任何人牺牲自己！

description.original: I know I ran, but it was only to get more pies!
description.display: 我知道我逃跑了，但只有这样才能拿到更多的派！

description.original: Oh sure, I *could* shower, but this is better.
description.display: 当然了，我*可以*洗澡，但这样更好。

description.original: Now THIS is how you use an eldritch blast!
description.display: 这就是你用魔能爆弹的办法吗！

description.original: Oh, you're alive again? That's good. I guess.
description.display: 哦，你又活了？挺好的。应该吧。

description.original: You want to be my friend? That sounds like a lot of work...
description.display: 你想跟我交朋友？听起来很费功夫......

description.original: You call it trash, I call them components.
The smell is actually just the waffles in my pocket.
description.display: 这味道其实只是我口袋里的华夫饼。

description.original: NO, no, no, no, no, NO! No, no, no, nooo!

effects.description: Increases the bonus damage granted to Aura of Unclean while Death Ward is on cooldown by 40%

description.original: We're friends? Are you moving into my trash pile?
description.display: 我们是朋友？你要搬进我的垃圾堆吗？

description.original: Do you smell burning trash? Yeah? Okay, good.
description.display: 你有闻到垃圾烧焦的味道吗？有？好，太好了。

character_sheet_details.backstory: The sorcerer known as Strix hails from Sigil, the City of Doors at the center of the multiverse. Very little is known of Strix's heritage, even to herself, but it was recently discovered that she was a powerful member of the Skizziks family, who long ago made a pact with Asmodeus, ruler of the Nine Hells, to become Tieflings. Strix is careful, suspicious, and paranoid. She assumes the worst in everyone and is always ready to run away or hide. She lacks basic manners and maintains poor personal hygiene, exemplified by the collection of filthy oddities she hoards within her robes. As a child, Strix witnessed a shadowy creature slaughter her friends at the bakery where she worked, but was spared for unknown reasons. Her survivor's guilt drives her to try and help those in need, no matter the personal cost.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Strix deals massive but slow AoE damage with her fireballs. She also causes enemies who get too close to take more damage from everyone.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 术士斯崔克丝来自位于多元宇宙中心的众门之城印记城。包括斯崔克丝自己在内，没人清楚斯崔克丝的血缘，但最近有人发现她是斯奇克家族的一名强大成员。他们很久以前就与九层地狱的统治者阿斯摩蒂斯签订契约，成为了提夫林。斯崔克丝小心、多疑且偏执，她以最大的恶意去揣测所有人，并随时准备逃跑或藏起来。她缺乏基本的礼仪，个人卫生状况也很糟糕，例如她的长袍里总会囤积着一些肮脏的怪东西。小时候，斯崔克丝在她工作的面包店里目睹了她的朋友被一只暗影生物追杀，但由于不明原因而幸免。她对幸存者的愧疚感，驱使着她努力帮助那些需要帮助的人，而不计较个人的得失。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 斯崔克丝的火球能造成大量而缓慢的范围伤害，也能提升所有人对近距离敌人的伤害。
